case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS VS. JEFFREY BLAIZE et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLAIZE, JEFFREY $1,461.93 PRINCIPAL, $227.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,688.93, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT CCP 585 (D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT BLAIZE, JEFFREY DOES 1-15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-02-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK SERVED SEP-14-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BLAIZE, JEFFREY
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT PER ORDER PLAINTIFF SUED INCORRECTLY AS AMERICAN EXPRESS TO BE AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTORNEY'S FEES DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $227.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BLAIZE, JEFFREY
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-15, INCLUSIVE
